---
title: "Short_antagonist_GLM1"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-10"
---

## Exploring egg donors as Short antagonist protcols and adding them as own Aetiology group 

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)


library(gridExtra)
library(factoextra)
library(mice)
library(lmtest)
library(car)
library(MASS)
install.packages("rsample")
install.packages("purrr")
library(purrr)
library(rsample)
library(here)
here::here()

freshdata <- read_csv(
  here("data","processed","freshdata_cleaned_new.csv"),
  name_repair = "minimal"
)

data <- read_csv(
  here("data","processed","short_protocol_data.csv"),
  name_repair = "minimal"
)
```

## BASELINE MODELLING
```{r}
baseline <- data %>%
  dplyr::select(
    No_mature_eggs,
    Age,
    BMI,
    Baseline_AMH,
    Baseline_total_follicles,
    Baseline_endometrium,
    Aetiology_group
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Aetiology_group = as.factor(Aetiology_group)
  )
```

### IMPUTATION: MEDIAN VS. MICE

```{r}
colSums(is.na(baseline))
```
## MEDIAN

```{r}
form <- No_mature_eggs ~ Age + BMI + Baseline_AMH +
  Baseline_total_follicles + Baseline_endometrium + Aetiology_group
```

```{r}
get_metrics <- function(actual, predicted) {
  rmse <- sqrt(mean((actual - predicted)^2))
  mae  <- mean(abs(actual - predicted))
  r2   <- 1 - sum((actual - predicted)^2) / sum((actual - mean(actual))^2)

  data.frame(
    RMSE = rmse,
    MAE  = mae,
    R2   = r2
  )
}
```

## Create CV folds
```{r}
folds <- vfold_cv(baseline, v = 5)

# objects to store results
pred_cc     <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(baseline))
pred_median <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(baseline))
pred_mice   <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(baseline))
```

## CV loop
```{r}
for (i in seq_along(folds$splits)) {

  split_obj <- folds$splits[[i]]

  train_data <- analysis(split_obj)
  test_data  <- assessment(split_obj)

  test_index <- as.integer(rownames(test_data))
  
# complete case model 
  
  train_cc <- train_data %>%
    tidyr::drop_na(
      No_mature_eggs, Age, BMI, Baseline_AMH,
      Baseline_total_follicles, Baseline_endometrium, Aetiology_group
    )

  test_cc <- test_data %>%
    tidyr::drop_na(
      Age, BMI, Baseline_AMH,
      Baseline_total_follicles, Baseline_endometrium, Aetiology_group
    )

  if (nrow(train_cc) > 5 && nrow(test_cc) > 0) {
    fit_cc <- lm(form, data = train_cc)
    pred_vals_cc <- predict(fit_cc, newdata = test_cc)
    pred_cc[as.integer(rownames(test_cc))] <- pred_vals_cc
  }

# Median imputation model
  
  train_med <- train_data
  test_med  <- test_data

  num_vars <- c("BMI", "Baseline_AMH", "Baseline_total_follicles", "Baseline_endometrium")

  medians <- sapply(train_med[, num_vars], function(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE))

  for (v in num_vars) {
    train_med[[v]][is.na(train_med[[v]])] <- medians[v]
    test_med[[v]][is.na(test_med[[v]])]   <- medians[v]
  }

  fit_med <- lm(form, data = train_med)
  pred_vals_med <- predict(fit_med, newdata = test_med)
  pred_median[test_index] <- pred_vals_med

  ## MICE imputation
  
  train_mice <- train_data
  test_mice  <- test_data

  # combine train + test temporarily
  # test outcomes are set to NA and ignored in imputation model fitting
  combined <- bind_rows(train_mice, test_mice)

  train_n <- nrow(train_mice)
  test_n  <- nrow(test_mice)

  # prevent test outcomes contributing anything
  combined$No_mature_eggs[(train_n + 1):(train_n + test_n)] <- NA

  meth <- make.method(combined)
  pred <- make.predictorMatrix(combined)
  
   # do not impute outcome
  meth["No_mature_eggs"] <- ""

  # allow outcome to predict covariates, but not itself
  pred[, "No_mature_eggs"] <- 1
  pred["No_mature_eggs", ] <- 0

  # stop test rows from influencing imputation model
  ignore_vec <- c(rep(FALSE, train_n), rep(TRUE, test_n))

  # methods for incomplete continuous predictors
  meth["BMI"] <- "pmm"
  meth["Baseline_AMH"] <- "pmm"
  meth["Baseline_total_follicles"] <- "pmm"
  meth["Baseline_endometrium"] <- "pmm"

  imp <- mice(
    combined,
    m = 5,
    method = meth,
    predictorMatrix = pred,
    ignore = ignore_vec,
    seed = 123 + i,
    printFlag = FALSE
  )

  # fit model in each imputed dataset and predict test fold
  fold_preds <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = test_n, ncol = 5)

  for (j in 1:5) {
    comp_j <- complete(imp, action = j)

    train_j <- comp_j[1:train_n, ]
    test_j  <- comp_j[(train_n + 1):(train_n + test_n), ]

    fit_j <- lm(form, data = train_j)
    fold_preds[, j] <- predict(fit_j, newdata = test_j)
  }

  # average predictions across imputed datasets
  pred_mice[test_index] <- rowMeans(fold_preds)
}
```

```{r}
# complete-case metrics only on rows that received a prediction
cc_idx <- which(!is.na(pred_cc))
metrics_cc <- get_metrics(
  actual = baseline$No_mature_eggs[cc_idx],
  predicted = pred_cc[cc_idx]
) %>%
  mutate(Model = "Complete case")

metrics_median <- get_metrics(
  actual = baseline$No_mature_eggs,
  predicted = pred_median
) %>%
  mutate(Model = "Median imputation")

metrics_mice <- get_metrics(
  actual = baseline$No_mature_eggs,
  predicted = pred_mice
) %>%
  mutate(Model = "MICE imputation")

results <- bind_rows(metrics_cc, metrics_median, metrics_mice) %>%
  select(Model, RMSE, MAE, R2)

print(results)
```

```{r}
kruskal.test(GnRH_agonist_trigger_dose ~ Aetiology_group, data = data)
```
